name: Creamy Vegetable Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 Green pepper, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart microwave-safe casserole, combine potatoes and vegetable juice until the sauce is dissolved.
2. Stir in zucchini, tomato, pepper, onion, butter, and basil.
3. Cover loosely with plastic wrap; cook on High for 6 to 8 minutes, stirring once.
4. Stir in milk. Re-cover and cook on High for 7 to 9 minutes or until potatoes and vegetables are just tender, stirring once.
5. Let stand for 5 minutes. Makes 4 servings.
